hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if '/web/' in fp or fp.endswith('/web'):
    try:
        with open('md/WEB.md') as f:
            content = f.read()
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'REMINDER: Read md/WEB.md conventions before editing web/ files.\n\n' + content}}))
    except:
        pass
"
